records.ety: [OE. britel, brutel, AS. bryttian to dispense, fr. bretan to break; akin to Icel. brytja, Sw. bryta, Dan. bryde. Cf. Brickle.]

defs: Easily broken; apt to break; fragile; not tough or tenacious<-- contrast to flexible; usually hard -->.
quotes: Farewell, thou pretty, brittle piece Of fine-cut crystal.
